title: KAV Jumbo Large Money Tin Box (22 CM) - Multicoluor Coin Bank, Ideal Money Saving Jar for Adults & Kids, Perfect for Rainy Day Savings, Sealed to Prevent Dipping, British Banknote Design
features: 𝐋𝐀𝐑𝐆𝐄 𝐂𝐀𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐒𝐀𝐕𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒: The KAV Jumbo Large Money Tin Box offers ample space for your money savings. With dimensions of 15cm diameter x 22cm height, making it perfect for storing coins and notes for various future needs. This large piggy bank is ideal for those who want to save big without frequent emptying.

𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄: The multicolor money tin is made from high-quality tin and aluminium. The durable savings jar is not only durable but also adds a splash of color and charm to any room. The robust construction ensures long-lasting use, while the vibrant British banknote design makes saving money more enjoyable and visually appealing.

𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐔𝐑𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐒𝐄𝐀𝐋𝐄𝐃: The decorative money tin is sealed to prevent easy access. It requires a tin opener to retrieve funds. This design encourages disciplined saving habits and reduces the temptation to dip into your savings.

𝐍𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐓𝐘 𝐁𝐀𝐍𝐊𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Featuring unique British banknote designs available in £5, £10, £20, and £50 denominations, this savings jar for adults box is a fun and eye-catching addition to your saving routine.

𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐆𝐈𝐅𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀𝐋𝐋 𝐀𝐆𝐄 𝐆𝐑𝐎𝐔𝐏: The large coin bank is ideal for both adults and kids. The KAV Money Tin Box makes a great novelty gift for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion, promoting financial responsibility in a fun and engaging way.
description: Save for a brighter future with the KAV Jumbo Large Money Tin Box, a fun and practical solution for both adults and kids. This British Pound Design multicolor savings jar is crafted from durable tin and aluminium and designed to help you set aside money for treats, shoes, holidays, or any rainy day needs. With its large dimensions (15cm diameter x 22cm height), the money tin provides ample space for your savings. The jumbo money tin box is an ideal addition to your desk, bedroom or office. The unique British banknote design adds a touch of novelty and charm, making the compact savings jar a perfect gift for any occasion. The sealed unit ensures that you stay committed to your saving goals by preventing easy access to your funds—you'll need a tin opener to retrieve your money. The KAV Money Tin Box is not just a practical tool but also a delightful piece of décor that encourages financial responsibility in a fun and engaging way. FEATURES: Made from sturdy tin and aluminum for long-lasting use. 15cm diameter x 22cm height provides ample space for savings. Requires a tin opener to access money, promoting disciplined saving. Bright and attractive design suitable for any room. Available in £5, £10, £20, £50 note designs for a unique look. Suitable for both adults and kids, encouraging saving habits. Great novelty gift for birthdays, holidays, and special occasions. Ideal for saving for various needs like treats, shoes, and holidays. Fits comfortably in any bedroom or office space. A fun way to teach kids about saving money.
